author: mark
text:
Add SPEC-federated-state.md for the multi-repo state model

The master_url / federated state model shipped across roughly thirty commits with no design document, unlike the project's three other major subsystems which each carry a SPEC. This adds docs/SPEC-federated-state.md as the authoritative contract.

Covers: the master.json pointer schema, state-repo materialization and re-materializability, the symlink config seam, the state_worktree_dir discovery seam, the hard-fail/soft-fail reachability boundary, master-wins config policy, bilateral standalone-federated mobility via bl remaster, the repo field and bridge pattern, state_remote deprecation, a backwards-compatibility audit, and a fifteen-item conformance test list.

Documentation only; no code change. README and SKILL.md reconciliation is tracked separately as bl-9c17 and bl-7cea.
